content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 12:07 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
I need to find Bose's headphone product pages. Bose likely has different page types:
1. A "product page" (marketing/storytelling page with feature deep-dives)
2. A "buy/shop page" (purchase page with pricing and add to cart)

Please fetch the following URLs and confirm which ones work. For each working URL, describe what type of page it is:

1. https://www.bose.com/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones/QCUH-HEADPHONEARN.html
2. https://www.bose.com/p/earbuds/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-earbuds/QCUE-EARBUDSTWS.html
3. https://www.bose.com/p/earbuds/bose-ultra-open-earbuds/UltraOpenEarbuds.html
4. https://www.bose.com/categories/headphones
5. https://www.bose.com/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-headphones/QCHEADPHONES.html

Also try these alternative URL patterns:
6. https://www.bose.com/products/headphones
7. https://www.bose.com/c/headphones

For each page that works, extract:
- The page title
- The URL structure  
- A brief description of the page layout (hero section, what sections exist)
- Key section names visible on the page
- Whether it's a marketing page, a combined marketing+purchase page, or a pure purchase page
- Any navigation tabs or sticky nav elements
- Whether Bose separates marketing pages from purchase pages, or combines them into one

Return ALL findings so the user can confirm which pages to analyze.
</user_query>
The user wants me to fetch multiple Bose URLs to analyze their page types and structures. Let me fetch all these URLs in parallel to be efficient.

多数 URL 返回了 404 或重定向到首页。我从已获取的页面中发现了真实的产品链接，现在去抓取这些实际有效的产品页。

Let me analyze what I found. URL #1 redirected to the homepage, URLs #2-6 returned 404, and URL #7 worked and showed a category page. Let me now try to find the actual product pages. The category page mentioned:
- Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen) - `/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones-2nd-gen/QCUH2-HEADPHONEARN.html`
- Bose QuietComfort Headphones - linked somewhere

The old URLs might have been replaced with new product versions. Let me try the actual product page URLs from the links I found in the category page.


Now I'll fetch the product pages I discovered in the category listing, including the QuietComfort Ultra Headphones and Ultra Open Earbuds, and explore the earbuds section to see what else is available.

找到了几个有效页面。现在补充获取更多产品页和 Bose 的 stories 页面，确认是否存在独立营销页。

Now let me try to find the Bose QuietComfort Headphones page. From the category page, the comparison table linked to them but I didn't see a specific URL. Let me try different URL patterns. The category page listed "Bose QuietComfort Headphones" at $359 with a "Petal Pink" color. Let me search for the right URL.

Also, I should try to find the QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds (2nd Gen) page since it appeared in the earbuds category.

Let me also check if there are any "stories" or separate marketing pages on bose.com.
Let me read the file that was created for the QC Ultra Earbuds 2nd Gen page, and also try to fetch the Bose stories page about QC Ultra Headphones to see if it's a separate marketing page.

再尝试获取 Stories 文章页面和可能的独立营销页。

Let me also try the stories page with the correct URL format and check for any marketing-specific pages. Let me also try some other patterns.

Now I have a comprehensive picture of Bose's website structure. Let me compile all findings for the user.

Key findings:
1. Bose does NOT separate marketing pages from purchase pages. They combine everything into one long-scroll product page.
2. The URL pattern is `/p/{category}/{product-name}/{SKU-ID}.html` for product pages
3. The URL pattern is `/c/{category}` for category listing pages
4. The `/stories/` section has editorial/blog content that links to products, but these are not product marketing pages per se
5. Old product URLs from my initial set were mostly 404 because the products have been updated to new generations (2nd Gen)


6. The category listing pages work fine, but many of the older product URLs redirect to the homepage since those products have been superseded by newer versions. I've found that most of the Bose headphone URLs are working correctly and returning product pages, but a couple of the category-level URLs are returning 404 errors, so those paths don't seem to exist on their site.

input.final_summary: 完成了对 7 个用户提供的 URL 和额外发现的真实产品页的全面抓取分析。核心发现：Bose 不分离营销页和购买页，而是将品牌叙事 + 产品特性深潜 + 购买面板 + 规格 + FAQ + 评论整合在同一个长页面中。有效的 URL 模式为 `/p/{category}/{product-name}/{SKU}.html`（产品页）和 `/c/{category}`（品类列表页），`/stories/` 为独立的编辑内容博客。用户提供的多数 URL 已因产品换代（2nd Gen）而 404。

content.text:
---

## 全部发现汇总

### 一、你提供的 7 个 URL 状态

| # | URL | 状态 | 说明 |
|---|-----|------|------|
| 1 | `/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones/QCUH-HEADPHONEARN.html` | **重定向到首页** | 一代已下架，跳转到 bose.com 首页 |
| 2 | `/p/earbuds/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-earbuds/QCUE-EARBUDSTWS.html` | **404** | SKU 错误，一代已下架 |
| 3 | `/p/earbuds/bose-ultra-open-earbuds/UltraOpenEarbuds.html` | **404** | SKU 错误（正确 SKU 见下方） |
| 4 | `/categories/headphones` | **404** | 路径不存在 |
| 5 | `/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-headphones/QCHEADPHONES.html` | **404** | SKU 错误 |
| 6 | `/products/headphones` | **404** | 路径不存在 |
| 7 | `/c/headphones` | **有效** | 品类列表页 |

---

### 二、实际有效的产品页 URL（从品类页提取）

我从品类页中发现了 Bose 当前在售产品的真实 URL，并逐一抓取验证：

| 产品 | 有效 URL | 价格 |
|------|---------|------|
| QC Ultra Headphones **2nd Gen** | `/p/headphones/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones-2nd-gen/QCUH2-HEADPHONEARN.html` | $449 |
| QC Ultra Earbuds **2nd Gen** | `/p/earbuds/bose-quietcomfort-ultra-earbuds-2nd-gen/QCUE2-HEADPHONEIN.html` | $299 |
| Ultra Open Earbuds | `/p/earbuds/bose-ultra-open-earbuds/ULT-HEADPHONEOPN.html` | $299 |

品类列表页：
- `/c/headphones` — 头戴式耳机品类
- `/c/earbuds` — 耳塞品类

---

### 三、Bose 页面类型分析

#### 结论：Bose **不分离**营销页和购买页，而是合并为一个长页面。

每个 `/p/` 产品页都是一个 **营销 + 购买合体页**，从上到下包含以下区块：

**QC Ultra Headphones 2nd Gen 页面结构（典型代表）：**

1. **Feature Icons Bar** — 顶部一排图标式卖点条（CustomTune / 降噪 / 舒适 / 30 小时 / 沉浸音频 / Cinema Mode / 通话 / App）
2. **产品名 + 评分** — `# Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen)` + 4.6/5 (313 条)
3. **品牌叙事段落** — "Obsessively engineered with our best noise cancellation and spatialized audio..."
4. **购买面板（右侧 sticky）** — 颜色选择器、$449 价格、数量、BoseCare 保修选项、Add to Cart
5. **Benefits Bar** — 90 天退货 / 价格匹配 / 免费配送 / Afterpay
6. **Accessories 推荐** — 交叉推荐配件
7. **Feature Icons Bar（重复）** — 向下滚动后再次出现（sticky 效果）
8. **Product Details 折叠区** — What's in the box、USB 充电说明、Technical Specifications 表格
9. **FAQ 折叠区** — 约 12 个常见问题
10. **Support** — App 下载链接、用户手册
11. **品牌叙事滚动区（核心营销内容）** — 每个区块对应一个卖点：
    - "The next level of legendary sound"
    - "Our best noise cancelling"
    - "All you listen to. Totally immersive." (Immersive Audio + Cinema Mode)
    - "Seriously plush. Super stylish." (材质与设计)
    - "Even easier listening" (头部检测、快速启动)
    - "Sink deeper into sound" (Quiet / Aware / Immersive / Cinema 模式切换)
    - "This sound's personal" (CustomTune)
    - "Sleek meets soft" / "A hug for your ears" / "Designed to turn heads" (设计叙事)
    - "The app makes it even easier" (App CTA)
12. **Features 网格** — 精炼版卖点列表（与上方叙事区重叠但更精简）
13. **Why Buy from Bose** — 信任徽章
14. **Product Comparison 表格** — 与同品类其他产品的对比表（QC Ultra 2nd Gen vs QC Headphones）
15. **Ratings and Reviews** — 用户评价

#### Ultra Open Earbuds 页面结构（同一模式，卖点不同）：

- Feature Icons Bar → 产品名 + 评分 → 品牌叙事 → 购买面板 → BoseCare → Accessories
- 营销滚动区："Give your life a soundtrack" / "In sync and open to anything" / "Music from start to finish" / "For your ears only" / "Weightless comfort" / "The app makes it even easier"
- 交叉推荐区："Earbuds for all your needs"（引导到 QC Ultra Earbuds）
- Features 网格 → Why Buy → Comparison 表格 → Reviews

---

### 四、Bose 另外两种页面类型

| 页面类型 | URL 模式 | 说明 |
|----------|---------|------|
| **品类列表页** | `/c/{category}` | 产品卡片网格 + 筛选（Spatial Audio / Noise Cancelling）+ 对比表 + SEO 长文案。纯购物导航页。 |
| **Stories 编辑内容** | `/stories/{slug}` | 博客/教育内容，例如 "How do noise cancelling headphones work?"。文末嵌入产品卡片作为购买入口。**这是最接近"独立营销页"的形态**，但它是品类级教育内容，不是单品深潜页。 |

---

### 五、关键发现总结

- **Bose 采用"合体页"架构**：单个 `/p/` URL 同时承载品牌叙事（marketing storytelling）和购买转化（add to cart），没有独立的 marketing page。
- **URL 模式**：`/p/{category}/{product-slug}/{SKU}.html`，SKU 区分新旧代（`QCUH-` → `QCUH2-`）。
- **Sticky 购买元素**：购买面板和 Feature Icons Bar 都有 sticky 行为，向下滚动时持续可见。
- **产品换代后旧 URL 直接失效**：不做 301 重定向到新代产品，而是跳首页或 404。
- **`/stories/` 是 Bose 的内容层**：编辑类文章，底部嵌入产品卡。这层内容不替代产品页的营销叙事，两者并行。

你需要我对其中某个产品页做更细致的 section-by-section 分析吗？
